zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose於1260年出生在英國素可布拉波時，他的父親John Braos31歲，母親Margaret Unknown31歲。他於大約1300年與Agnes de Sully在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年5月1日在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose于1260年出生在英国素可布拉波时，他的父亲John Braos31岁，母亲Margaret Unknown31岁。他于大约1300年与Agnes de Sully在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根高維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年5月1日在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose was born in 1260, in Bramber, Sussex, England, his father, John Braos, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Unknown, was 31. He married Agnes de Sully about 1300, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 May 1326, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose est né en 1260, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Braos, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Unknown, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Sully environ 1300, à Gower, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose 1260 in Bramber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Braos 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Unknown 31. Er hat um 1300 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Agnes de Sully geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1326 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose è nato il nel 1260 nel Bramber, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Braos, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Unknown, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Sully circa 1300, nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Braose 2nd Baron Braoseが1260年にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父John Braosは31歳，母Margaret Unknownは31歳であった。約1300年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルでAgnes de Sullyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年5月1日に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose(이)가 1260년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Braos(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Unknown(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 Agnes de Sully(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 5월 1일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose nasceu em 1260, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Braos, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Unknown, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Sully aproximadamente 1300, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose родился в 1260 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Braos было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Unknown, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Sully около 1300 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 мая 1326 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose nació en 1260, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Braos, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Unknown, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes de Sully aproximadamente 1300, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1326, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
